name: Okta Support Session Impersonation Events (30 days)
description: Detects support impersonation grant/initiation events in Okta, aligned with public Panther detections.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, l.target_id, l.target_type, l.event_type, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) IN ('user.session.impersonation.grant', 'user.session.impersonation.initiate') AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, 'success')) IN ('success', 'allow', 'allowed') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Verify support impersonation events are approved and time-bound; revoke unauthorized support sessions and rotate impacted credentials.
